LanguageData.ColdBath.stages.0.label: cold bathhouse plunge
LanguageData.HeatedPool.stages.0.description: The heated bathhouse pool was deeply relaxing.
LanguageData.HeatedPool.stages.0.label: heated bathhouse pool
LanguageData.HotBath.stages.0.label: hot bathhouse soak
LanguageData.HotShower.stages.0.description: I had a proper hot shower in the bathhouse.
LanguageData.HotShower.stages.0.label: hot bathhouse shower
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedDigestibleResurrectorNanites: I feel invincible after that dose of aqua cura.
LanguageData.VCE_SmokeleafButterHigh.stages.0.label: high on brahmin shroom butter
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyAsIngredient.stages.0.label: drank pungashine-based atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_ChemshineAsIngredient.stages.0.label: drank rotgut-based atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_DrankSoda.stages.0.description: I drank a chilled bottle of homebrew sarsaparilla. A small luxury.
LanguageData.VBE_DrankSoda.stages.0.label: drank homebrew sarsaparilla
LanguageData.VBE_GinAsIngredient.stages.0.label: drank gin-based atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_RBMeadAsIngredient.stages.0.label: drank mead-based atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_TequilaAsIngredient.stages.0.label: drank tequila-based atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_VodkaAsIngredient.stages.0.label: drank vodka-based atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_WhiskeyAsIngredient.stages.0.label: drank whiskey-based atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_WineAsIngredient.stages.0.label: drank wine-based atomic cocktail
LanguageData.VCEV_NeedVariety.stages.0.description: I know this is the wasteland, but eating the same dreary slop every single day still wears a person down.
LanguageData.VCEV_NeedVariety.stages.1.description: Between diner staples, caravan finds, and campfire experiments, the menu around here stays surprisingly rich.
